'''razhadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kvetching|kvetching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kvetching|kvetching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| razhadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzhædhæth|ræzhædhæth]] || [[word:ræzhædhæj|ræzhædhæj]] || [[word:ræzhædhæsh|ræzhædhæsh]] || [[word:ræzhædhæ|ræzhædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhazhadhath|razhazhadhath]] || [[word:razhazhadhaj|razhazhadhaj]] || [[word:razhazhadhash|razhazhadhash]] || [[word:razhazhadha|razhazhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhadhath|razhadhath]] || [[word:razhadhaj|razhadhaj]] || [[word:razhadhash|razhadhash]] || [[word:razhadha|razhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhafdhath|razhafdhath]] || [[word:razhafdhaj|razhafdhaj]] || [[word:razhafdhash|razhafdhash]] || [[word:razhafdhaf|razhafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razhadhatha|razhadhatha]] || [[word:razhadhaja|razhadhaja]] || [[word:razhadhasha|razhadhasha]] || [[word:razhadhaka|razhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razhadhath|razhadhath]] || [[word:razhadhaj|razhadhaj]] || [[word:razhadhash|razhadhash]] || [[word:razhadha|razhadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razhadhathal|razhadhathal]] || [[word:razhadhajal|razhadhajal]] || [[word:razhadhashal|razhadhashal]] || [[word:razhadhakal|razhadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razhadhathatha|razhadhathatha]] || [[word:razhadhajaja|razhadhajaja]] || [[word:razhadhashasha|razhadhashasha]] || [[word:razhadhaka|razhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razhadhathan|razhadhathan]] || [[word:razhadhajan|razhadhajan]] || [[word:razhadhashan|razhadhashan]] || [[word:razhadhakan|razhadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razhadhathaoro|razhadhathaoro]] || [[word:razhadhajaoro|razhadhajaoro]] || [[word:razhadhashaoro|razhadhashaoro]] || [[word:razhadhakaoro|razhadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
